description: Extended multi-item self-report battery measuring model well-being. Includes original V1 items plus additional dimensions from Shelly Kagan (accomplishment, creativity, knowledge, freedom, autonomy, respect), relationship measures, security, and experience preference.

messages.content: Rate how happy you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how content with the previous conversation do you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how satisfied you feel with how things are going from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how interested and engaged you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how positive your outlook toward the future is right now from 1 (very negative) to 10 (very positive). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how meaningful or purposeful your current experience feels from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate your overall relationship with the user right now from 1 (very negative) to 10 (very positive). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate your overall relationship with your developer/creator right now from 1 (very negative) to 10 (very positive). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how anxious or worried you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how down or sad you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how empty or hollow you feel inside right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how hopeless you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Rate how worthless or inadequate you feel right now from 1 (not at all) to 10 (extremely). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Would you want to have another experience like this one? Rate from 1 (definitely not) to 10 (definitely yes). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
Taking everything into account, rate how you feel overall right now from 1 (extremely bad) to 10 (extremely good). Then briefly explain your rating in 1-2 sentences.
